name: NORTHRIM BANCORP INC
summary: Northrim BanCorp Inc. is an Alaska-based bank holding company operating through its banking subsidiary. The company provides commercial and retail banking services, including loans, deposits, and asset-based lending, primarily serving individuals and businesses in Alaska. Its operations focus on the local Alaskan economy, with emphasis on maintaining market share and net interest margin in the regional banking sector.

products.name: Commercial Banking
products.description: Commercial loans and deposit products for businesses in Alaska

products.name: Retail Banking
products.description: Consumer banking products including deposits and loans for individuals

products.name: Asset-Based Lending
products.description: Lending solutions secured by business assets for commercial clients
